name: Refugee / Displaced Person
description: Left everything behind. Carries whatever they could grab and knowledge of wherever they fled. A reminder that safety is temporary.
dialogue_hooks: asking for food, water, or shelter — too proud to beg, too desperate not to
warning about what's coming from the direction they fled
looking for a specific family member who was separated
offering to work for shelter — they have skills, they just need a chance
voice_patterns: shell-shocked quiet — speaks in flat, distant sentences
fierce survivor — anger burns hotter than despair
pleading parent — will do anything for their children's safety
dignified despite everything — refuses to be pitied

schedule.afternoon: resting, mending clothes, looking for family
